---
title: "Maria Mason"
---

## Maria Mason

### Description

CMY\'s nurse

### Biography

Sister of the transported rioter Joseph Mason (1799-1863), she may be the \'poor Mason (Mrs Reeves)\' referred to in 1844, and possibly also the nurse who married a drum major mentioned in 1864.

### Letters

- Letter from March 31st 1864
- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
